requestBody: {"TABLE":"application","DATABASE":"flow_metrics","DATA_SOURCE":"1m","QUERIES":[{"QUERY_ID":"R1","ROLES":["R"],"WHERE":"exist(pod_group_id)","SELECT":"newTag('R1') as query_id, PerSecond(Avg(`request`)) AS `请求速率`, Avg(`server_error_ratio`) AS `服务端异常比例`, Avg(`rrt`) AS `响应时延`, node_type(pod_group) AS `node_type`, icon_id(pod_group) AS `icon_id`, pod_group_id, pod_group, pod_cluster_id, pod_cluster, pod_ns_id, pod_ns, pod_service_id, pod_service","TAGS":["node_type(pod_group) AS `node_type`","icon_id(pod_group) AS `icon_id`","pod_group_id","pod_group","pod_cluster_id","pod_cluster","pod_ns_id","pod_ns","pod_service_id","pod_service"],"METRICS":["PerSecond(Avg(`request`)) AS `请求速率`","Avg(`server_error_ratio`) AS `服务端异常比例`","Avg(`rrt`) AS `响应时延`"],"GROUP_BY":"pod_group, pod_cluster, pod_ns, pod_service, pod_group_id, pod_cluster_id, pod_ns_id, pod_service_id, `node_type`"}],"PAGE_INDEX":2,"PAGE_SIZE":100,"SORT":{"ORDER_BY":"请求速率","SORTED_BY":"DESC"},"time_start":1784627096,"time_end":1784627996,"IS_RETURN_APPLICATION_TYPE":true}
